_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, HGF was not significantly different in the serum of controls (1.1 ng/mL) compared with NF1 patients with pNF (1.0 ng/mL), NF1 patients without pNF (0.95 ng/mL), or NF1 patients with MPNSTs (1.5 ng/mL)
details: Did not detect significant differences in HGF serum levels between controls (1.1 ng/mL) and NF1 patients with pNF (1.0 ng/mL), without pNF (0.95 ng/mL), or with MPNSTs (1.5 ng/mL)
